hypothesis: Implement day-of-week demand patterns and adaptive reorder thresholds to better match actual demand fluctuations and reduce excess inventory.

Implement a dynamic reorder point that adapts to both short-term demand patterns and long-term trends, combined with a cooldown period to prevent over-ordering, while incorporating day-of-week patterns to better match actual demand fluctuations.

Implement a multi-strategy policy that combines momentum-based reordering with day-of-week demand patterns and adaptive thresholds to better match actual demand fluctuations while minimizing excess inventory.
